message:
feat(sync): detect openrsync (macOS 15+) and skip unsupported --protect-args flag

openrsync, which ships as the default rsync on macOS 15+, does not support
the --protect-args flag that GNU rsync uses to preserve spaces and special
characters in remote paths. This caused rsync transfers to fail silently
on modern macOS hosts.

Changes:
- Add is_openrsync() detection with OnceLock caching that checks the first
  line of `rsync --version` output for the "openrsync:" prefix
- Conditionally omit --protect-args when openrsync is detected
- Refactor rsync command assembly to extract local_path validation and
  timeout formatting before the Command builder for clearer control flow
- Import std::sync::OnceLock for thread-safe lazy initialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
